name: Jellyfin Helper
description: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders, empty media folders, and orphaned subtitles. Provides media library statistics with audio codec analysis, export, caching, historical trends, trash/recycle bin, Arr stack integration (Radarr/Sonarr), and a multi-language dashboard (en, de, fr, es, pt, zh, tr).
overview: Automated cleanup (trickplay, empty folders, subtitles), media statistics with export/trends, trash bin, Arr integration, and multi-language dashboard.

versions.changelog: Fixed config page not loading (script/style tags moved inside page div), plugin now visible in Jellyfin sidebar menu with EnableInMainMenu, updated test count to 212.

Initial release with trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, orphaned subtitle cleaner, media statistics dashboard, audio codec analysis, export (JSON/CSV), historical trends, trash/recycle bin, Arr stack integration (Radarr/Sonarr), multi-language dashboard (en/de/fr/es/pt/zh/tr), library whitelist/blacklist, and 196 tests.
